testsuite.name: agentforge.agent.AgentRuntimeTest

testcase.name: executeTask with unknown agent type returns failure
asTaskExecutor adapts runtime for WorkflowEngine use
executeTask routes to correct agent and returns result
registerAgent adds agent to the pool
SummarizerAgent with empty input returns empty summary

testsuite.system-out: 09:05:05.275 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.AgentRuntime -- Registered agent: summarizer 09:05:05.275 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1] DEBUG agentforge.agent.AgentRuntime -- Task summarize completed by agent summarizer in 0ms 09:05:05.276 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.AgentRuntime -- Registered agent: summarizer 09:05:05.277 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1] DEBUG agentforge.agent.AgentRuntime -- Task summarize completed by agent summarizer in 0ms 09:05:05.283 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.AgentRuntime -- Registered agent: summarizer 09:05:05.284 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.AgentRuntime -- Registered agent: summarizer 09:05:05.284 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.AgentRuntime -- Registered agent: classifier 09:05:05.285 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.AgentRuntime -- Registered agent: summarizer 09:05:05.285 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.AgentRuntime -- Registered agent: classifier
